title: datura metel var. fastuosa
intro: Datura metel var. fastuosa, also known as Devil's Trumpet or Angel's Trumpet, is a variety of the Datura metel plant, a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Datura metel var. fastuosa include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues, as well as pain management. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity and side effects.
